Off Calendar Nov-08-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF OHIO SECURITY INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion To Set Aside Dismissal, Enforce Settlement And Enter Judgment.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to set aside dismissal, enforce settlement and enter judgment is granted.

Prevailing party to prepare a proposed order.
